arts.sum: Sergio Reguilon wants to terminate his Tottenham contract in January and leave, with interest from Spain emerging.

arts.ttl: Tottenham could set new all-time Premier League record with victory over Ipswich Town
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur could set a new all-time Premier League winning record when they welcome Ipswich Town to North London for Sunday's showdown.

arts.ttl: Tottenham wonderkid proves Ange Postecoglou right as Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear repeat eyed
arts.sum: The latter of those missed school on Thursday to sit on the subs bench and though he remained there, the 16-year-old was very much involved in Spurs' Under-18s victory over Leicester City on Saturday at Hotspur Way. The young Foxes took the lead, but Williams-Barnett levelled the game with a truly outrageous goal. Nonetheless, both Moore and Lankshear are now firmly in Postecoglou's senior squad, with several more academy stars eyeing spots.

The 29-year-old has struggled for game time at Manchester City this season and he has been linked with a move away from the club. arts.ttl: Spurs fans to call for release of last British hostage held by Hamas
arts.sum: Emily Damari, 28, was kidnapped during 7 October attack Fans will gather before Sunday’s game against Ipswich Tottenham fans will gather before their team’s game against Ipswich on Sunday to call for the release of Emily Damari, the last remaining British hostage held by Hamas in Gaza. Damari, a Spurs supporter, has been in captivity for more than a year after being taken from her home in Kibbutz Kfar Aza during the 7 October attack on Israel by Hamas. Stop The Hate UK, an activist group based in London, has been raising awareness about the 28-year-old, who is one of about 100 hostages in Gaza, and about 70 campaigners held a rally for her outside the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium before Spurs faced Aston Villa last Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Real Madrid attacker Endrick on a loan deal. According to Fichajes, Real Madrid are hoping to send the 18-year-old out on loan so that he can play regular first-team football.
